sections: First-party intake, renderers, and Projection posture
HCM-0.6 exact shipped kind and root-profile data

repo_truth: The working tree contains an uncommitted HCM-0.6 documentation/control-pack subject over baseline 3030b189e573d641cc5d42efa5f54ff189b4c984. The user has supplied explicit product authority for the consolidated decision. Runtime/profile/schema/intake/renderer/Projection implementation is absent and out of scope. The reviewer must replay the manifest and derive its own verdict from live bytes.
allowed_scope: Remain read-only and replay every sorted manifest entry plus the aggregate before review.
Review the complete HCM-0.6 decision transcription, affected canonical 00-06 authority, slice control files, research provenance, pre-decision proof, and final proof wall.
Run read-only Markdown, YAML/JSON, link, fingerprint, Git, archive, handoff-validator, and semantic assertion checks needed to evaluate the subject.
Return findings first through the built-in channel with exact file/line evidence.
non_goals: No edits, staging, commits, new dispatches, global handoffs, ledger writes, or user-task hops.
No Rust, Cargo, runtime, schema/profile publication, setup/doctor, CLI, SDK, Tauri, Substrate, adapter, Projection, HCM-0.7, or HCM-0.9 work.
Do not invent subordinate schema fields, lifecycle policy IDs, intake/renderer IDs, migration behavior, adapter mappings, or condition inputs/precedence.
Do not treat current enums, examples, candidate values, labels, filenames, or prior reviewer conclusions as decision authority.
Do not require an alternative merely because it is conventional; a blocking finding must identify a violated approved decision, frozen contract, proof gate, or scope boundary.
tasks: Invoke the required skills in order, remain read-only, and replay the exact sorted 15-entry manifest and aggregate; return BLOCKED if any byte differs.

Review findings first in Critical, Required, Optional, Nit order. Each actionable finding must include severity, exact file/line, violated decision/contract/gate, why it matters, smallest valid remediation, and missing verification.

Verify the decision faithfully records exactly six independent @1.0.0 first-party kind refs and closes the artifact catalog without closing custom kinds, external systems, adapters, non-artifact records, or contract/evidence/gate semantics.

Verify the exact stable-role registry 1.0.0 and additive 1.1.0 content/fingerprints reproduce under the frozen uniform definition algorithm, existing role semantics are unchanged, and every shipped kind/root-profile table pins the exact 1.1.0 ref/fingerprint pair.

Verify kind/role/capability separation: Project Authority alone advertises constitutional_root through handbook.capabilities.constitutional-root@1.0.0; Work Specification supports exactly the five workflow roles; Decision and Risk support no role and use explicit null.

Verify the root profile selects exactly project_authority, project_context, and environment_context with the exact kind refs, roles, labels, paths, always/always/conditional requiredness, condition ref, and no work/decision/risk root instance.

Verify only project_authority is the always-required constitutional root and no role, label, path, kind ID, requiredness, example, external system, or inferred content can substitute for capability conformance and canonical authority.

Verify Project Context and Environment Context boundaries prevent constitutional, catalog, runbook, secret, volatile-live-state, inferred-fact, and exhaustive-duplication absorption while leaving exact subordinate schemas/content boundaries undecided.

Verify managed-operational-surface applicability requires independent authoritative evidence, covers exactly true/false/unknown/unresolved/stale/refused, makes only true/false boolean, refuses circular/self-satisfying/contradictory inputs, and does not invent exact inputs/evidence/precedence/implementation.

Verify lifecycle/reassessment language creates obligations without automatic mutation and that all six kinds receive first-party schema-backed intake and fixed deterministic review renderers while canonical YAML remains authority and the root profile selects no capitalized Projection.
Verify operational procedure, quality strategy, catalog, and all other unapproved artifact responsibilities remain deferred and cannot be smuggled into an approved kind.

Verify 00-06, SPEC, plan, todo, research outcome notes, decision, and proof agree; historical proof-gate wording is clearly historical; runtime/open gates remain unpromoted except documentation-only PG-DEFAULT-01.
Replay the proof wall sufficiently to identify fabricated, incomplete, recursive, stale, or untracked-byte assertions, including both registry fingerprints and the internal 14-entry aggregate.
Verify changed scope is documentation/control-pack only and HCM-0.7 is not started.
Return CLEAN only if there is no valid Critical or Required finding; otherwise return CHANGES_REQUIRED or BLOCKED. Make no edits.
stop_conditions: Return BLOCKED if the manifest, aggregate, required authority, or a required read-only verification cannot be reproduced.
Return CHANGES_REQUIRED rather than resolving any missing product/subordinate decision by inference.
Return to the parent if correction would require Rust/runtime/schema publication, HCM-0.7, another artifact kind, or authority outside approved HCM-0.6 documentation scope.
